info.title: csharp-mcp
info.description: Roslyn-powered C# code analysis MCP server and CLI tool. Provides 18 tools for symbol lookup, refactoring, diagnostics, and code generation.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: C# MCP - Roslyn-powered code analysis MCP server and CLI tool

commands.name: find-definition
commands.description: Find where a symbol (class, method, property, etc.) is defined

arguments.name: symbol-name
arguments.description: Name of the symbol to find

commands.name: find-references
commands.description: Find all references/usages of a symbol throughout the solution

arguments.name: symbol-name
arguments.description: Name of the symbol to find references for

commands.name: signature
commands.description: Get the signature and documentation of a symbol

commands.name: list-members
commands.description: List all members (methods, properties, fields) of a type

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Safely rename a symbol across the entire solution

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.description: Get all compilation errors, warnings, and info messages

commands.name: check-symbol-exists
commands.description: Quickly verify if a symbol exists and is accessible

arguments.name: symbol-name
arguments.description: Name of the symbol to check

commands.name: find-implementations
commands.description: Find all implementations of an interface or abstract class

arguments.name: symbol-name
arguments.description: Name of the interface or abstract class

commands.name: find-callers
commands.description: Find all methods that call a specific method

commands.name: find-callees
commands.description: Find all methods called by a specific method

commands.name: dependencies
commands.description: Analyze what types/namespaces a file or type depends on

commands.name: unused-code
commands.description: Find potentially unused code (methods, classes, properties)

commands.name: generate-interface
commands.description: Extract an interface from a class

commands.name: implement-interface
commands.description: Generate implementation stubs for an interface

commands.name: list-types
commands.description: List all types in a namespace or file

commands.name: namespace-tree
commands.description: Show the namespace hierarchy of the solution

commands.name: analyze-file
commands.description: Quick comprehensive analysis of a single file
